title: Let It Grow
description: Lets cactus and sugar cane grow higher
body: So you know the stupid limit of 3 on the cactus and sugar cane? Not anymore, you don't. Let It Grow increases the growth limit on cactus and sugar cane to 256! No more growth restrictions. Also check out BisectHosting! They are an amazing minecraft server hosting company! Using my code `froga` and you get 25% off your first month as well as support me!
